title: Dev's Mods
body:
This mod aims to make the Minecraft experience very realistic. The game will have attempt to also have an RPG styled experience. There will be dungeons and taverns spawning throughout the map. To find dungeons, head to taverns. The included shader is the recommended one for use. There is also physics to complete the realistic feel. Make sure to use the Physics Mod Pro, as described in Other Mods. The game has vanilla styled extra weapons, and fresh animations. 

My specs are an RTX 40 series and Intel Core i9. If you don't have similar specs, **DO NOT USE SHADERS!!**


## License
Credit to Structory Towers [https://github.com/Stardust-Labs-MC/Structory-Towers/releases/tag/v1.0.6](https://github.com/Stardust-Labs-MC/Structory-Towers/releases/tag/v1.0.6)
## Other mods
Due to copyright issues, one mod that I didn't add was the Physics Mod Pro. This mod is now available for free from the developer's Patreon. Please check it out and add it yourself. It makes the experience much better. The configuration for this mod is to have no liquid physics but ocean physics, no collapse, set block destroy to crumbled voxel, have the voxel size to 0.37, and have all other things default.
